productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Green Polo With Grey Stripes T-shirt
description: CompositionGreen polo neck t-shirt made of 100% eco-enriched cotton, with grey pin stripes, short sleeves, softly ribbed collar and cuff, fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, tape detailing on the chest, silver thread detailing on the left chest and under the collar, embroidered badge at the back, vented hem and buttoned shoulder flaps  FittingSlimWash care Machine wash in 30 degrees with like colors Wash dark colors separately Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Do not bleach Reshape garment in wet condition to its original form Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Polo neck t-shirts are a must-have in every man's wardrobe, for the simple reason that they are smart, classic and versatile. This green polo neck tee with grey stripes from classic polo is classy, elegant and neat. Made of pure cotton, it is comfortable and will keep sweat at bay. Pair it with chinos or jeans, depending on the occasion.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
